title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2 (2011) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Harry, Ron and Hermione continue their quest to vanquish the evil Voldemort once and for all. Just as things begin to look hopeless for the young wizards, Harry discovers a trio of magical objects that endow him with powers to rival Voldemort's formidable skills.
synopsis: Released in 2011, Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2 is a adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
